title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Weak to ordinary thunderstorms are expected for Far NE Germany & Far NW Poland

---Risk Areas---

GNRL
Far NE Germany & Far NW Poland

Thunderstorms are expected in the late night hours (1:00 - 3:00 CEST).
The expected thunderstorms should not bring any severe phenomena other than possible heavy rain, mainly in the Polish side.
